breathing.title: Box Breathing
breathing.description: 4-4-4-4 pattern to calm the nervous system

breathing.title: 4-7-8 Breathing
breathing.description: Deep relaxation breath — exhale twice as long as the inhale

breathing.title: Coherent Breathing
breathing.description: 5 seconds in, 5 seconds out — slows heart rate and steadies focus

grounding.title: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding
grounding.description: Name 5 things you see, 4 you hear, 3 you can touch, 2 you smell, 1 you taste.

grounding.title: Body Scan
grounding.description: Progressive relaxation from the top of your head down to your feet.

journal_prompts: What's one thing you handled well today?
How is your body feeling right now?
What would help you decompress tonight?
Name something you're grateful for from your shift.
Is there anything weighing on you that you'd like to set down?
What did you learn about yourself today?
Who supported you today, and how?
What do you need most right now?
Describe a moment from today where you felt capable.
If a colleague felt what you're feeling, what would you tell them?
